category_sources: Official GitHub repository describes Stern as multi-pod and container log tailing for Kubernetes.
source_facts.description says Stern tails multiple Kubernetes pods and containers.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository name and package name use stern.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface for stern usage and flags.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/stern/stern, so repo was not re-evaluated per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README documents Kubernetes pod queries, log request controls, templates, and CLI flags.
source_facts.description identifies Kubernetes pod/container log tailing.
